rulings.Case Title: IN RE: FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 30, 2015, Line 1. Notice Of Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds is GRANTED. Claimants shall receive $33,236.64 of the surplus funds deposited with the Court. No opposition filed. =(501/RAW)

rulings.Case Title: PYRAMID DESIGN(SERIES D) LLC ET AL VS. GERALD R. LOWE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Summary Adjudication As To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 30, 2015, Line 9 ( Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT GERALD LOWE, JACQUELINE LOWE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Summary Adjudication As To Complaint Defendants' Motion for Summary Judgment and Motion for Summary adjudication re: causes of action one and two are DENIED. Triable issues of fact re: facts 8, 19, 32 and 41. Defendants' Motion for summary adjudication re: third cause of action is granted. Opposing party concedes that there are no triable issues of fact in the response to separate statement, at page 23; no additional material facts are identified in the separate statement or in the opposition 8:1-19. The Court also notes the discrepancy between the statement made in opposition to Defendants' motion for Summary Judgment at 8:16-17 and Plaintiff's Notice of Motion for Summary Judgment at 2:6-7. =(501/RAW)

rulings.Case Title: PYRAMID DESIGN(SERIES D) LLC ET AL VS. GERALD R. LOWE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiffs Pyramid Desing Llcs And Klaus H. Burmeisters Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 30, 2015, Line 9 (Part 2 of 2). PLAINTIFF PYRAMID DESIGN(SERIES D) LLC, KLAUS BURMEISTER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiffs Pyramid Desing Llcs And Klaus H. Burmeisters Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist as to issues 4, 8, 10 and 11. =(501/RAW)

rulings.Case Title: CITY LIFE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 30, 2015, Line 4. DEFENDANT MARIO AVILA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to attach contract. =(501/RAW)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD L. WESTON VS. MIMI LAY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 30, 2015, Line 5. DEFENDANT MIMI LAY, WILLIAM LAY, DAW THAN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that landlord is barred from seeking holdover damages caused by wrongful occupancy of the real property in an action separate from unlawful detainer. =(501/RAW)
